summary: Full backend + frontend testing of the new CMS-driven portfolio. 18/18 pytest tests pass (health, public portfolio, login success/wrong-pass/wrong-email, /auth/me with/without token, admin portfolio profile/skills/projects/experience CRUD, bulk PUT, reset, contact auth-gated list). Frontend end-to-end CMS flow validated: /admin redirects to /admin/login, wrong-password shows 'Invalid email or password' error, correct login lands on dashboard with all 5 tabs, Profile edit + Save reflects on public hero, Skills add + Save reflects as chip on public site, Projects add + Save persists, Experience add + Save persists, Logout returns to /admin/login.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `allow_credentials=True` combined with explicit origins is fine, but current .env has CORS_ORIGINS='*' which forces allow_credentials=False. If the frontend ever needs cookies/credentials, set explicit origins (e.g. the preview URL).

server.py: contact create endpoint stores `created_at` as ISO string (line 322) but list endpoint converts it back to datetime via fromisoformat. Native BSON datetime would be cleaner and naturally sortable.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); recommend migrating to lifespan context manager in future Starlette versions.
server.py admin endpoints read-modify-write the full portfolio doc on every change. For higher write concurrency consider atomic $set/$push operators (low priority since single-admin CMS).

ProjectModel.categoryKey is Literal['aiml','llm','other'] which is good, but ProjectModel.category (display label) is free text. Frontend filter relies on categoryKey — ensure admin UI keeps them in sync when category is edited.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py (rewritten: added auth + admin CRUD coverage, 18 tests)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create-then-cleanup TEST_-prefixed projects/experience/skills via API (each test restores state). Frontend test left a TEST_Project_Auto + TEST_Exp_Auto + TEST_Skill_Auto in the DB; cleanup was performed by calling POST /api/admin/portfolio/reset after frontend tests — portfolio is back to seed (name='Vejandla Revanth Varma', 4 skill groups, 3 projects, 3 experiences).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file is at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py and must be run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var set (it does not default). Admin seeded idempotently on startup from /app/backend/.env (ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD). JWT secret in backend/.env, 7-day expiry. Portfolio is a single MongoDB doc with _id='singleton' in db.portfolio. Frontend stores token in localStorage via AuthContext + axios interceptor. Admin dashboard PUT /api/admin/portfolio on Save (bulk replace).
